name: Pets Empire Bird Parrot Toys Reggae Man for Mini Macaw Cockatoo African Grey 1 Piece
description: Easy attachment with quick link to in side the cage or out side the cage, in door or out door. Made with 100% pet safe, non-toxic, colors and materials, length-26 cm (medium) Give your pet a treat and have hours of fun watching them play. Bird toys encourage foot and beak exercise while providing mental stimulation. Your bird will spend hours climbing, pulling and chomping on a variety of shapes and textures.
